title: Netru Illadha Maatram Lyrics Pudhiya Mugam
stanzas:
Netru Illadha Maatram Song Lyrics Pudhiya Mugam
#ARRahman #SujathaMohan #Vairamuthu

[ Netru illadha
maattram ennadhu.
kaattru en kadhile
thaan sonnadhu.

idhuthaan kadhal enbadhaa
ilamai pongi vittadhaa
idhayam sindhi vittadhaa
sol manamae  ] (2)

Kadavul illai endren
thaayai kaanum varai
kanavu illai endren
aasai thondrum varai

kavaidhai variyin suvai
artham puriyum varai
gangai neerin suvai
kadalil serum varai

Netru illadha
maattram ennadhu.
kaattru en kadhile
thaan sonnadhu.

idhuthaan kadhal enbadhaa
ilamai pongi vittadhaa
idhayam sindhi vittadhaa
sol manamae

vaasam illamalaee
vanna poo pookkalaam.
vaasam illaamale
kaattru vandhaadalaam

[ Netru illadha
maattram ennadhu.
kaattru en kadhile
thaan sonnadhu.

idhuthaan kadhal enbadhaa
ilamai pongi vittadhaa
idhayam sindhi vittadhaa
sol manamae  ] (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting on the changes in emotions and relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Pudhiya Mugam.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Sujatha Mohan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

This song was released on May 28, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Netru Illadha Maatram, the protagonist reflects on the fleeting nature of love and the emotional turmoil that accompanies it. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of longing and nostalgia, making it a poignant moment in Pudhiya Mugam. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes deep emotions, resonating with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. This timeless piece remains a favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Netru Illadha Maatram from Pudhiya Mugam is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voice of Sujatha Mohan and the soulful lyrics by Vairamuthu, this song resonates deeply with listeners. A.R. Rahman's magical composition elevates the emotional depth, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: What is the change that has no yesterday? The wind has told me in my heart.
Is this what love is? Has youth faded away? Has the heart lost its way? Tell me, my mind.
I say there is no God until I see my mother; there is no dream until my desire awakens.
Love is a lie, until I see you.
The taste of love will be understood until the flavor of the river water reaches the sea.
The taste of love is one, until the wind blows.
What is the change that has no yesterday? The wind has told me in my heart.
Is this what love is? Has youth faded away? Has the heart lost its way? Tell me, my mind.
The sky may not exist, but the earth can exist without words; language may not exist, but it can still be there.
Without a home, flowers can bloom; without a home, the wind can come.
What is the change that has no yesterday? The wind has told me in my heart.
Is this what love is? Has youth faded away? Has the heart lost its way? Tell me, my mind.
